# terrible_slurp (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `src` (String) The file on the remote system to fetch. This I(must) be a file, not a directory.

### Read-Only

- `content` (String) Encoded file content
- `encoding` (String) Type of encoding used for file
- `result` (String) Full raw JSON result from Ansible
- `source` (String) Actual path of file slurped
